channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti sprayed on the wall, 21st May
item.description:
Can you please clean off the graffiti that has been sprayed on the wall.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This tree has died, 21st May
item.description:
This tree was fine last year but this year it has no signs of life. There is damage around the base of the tree, perhaps disease. In time we worry about it falling on a nearby house, care or bike shed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maury Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike lane open without signals, 21st May
item.description:
A bike lane has been under construction on this road for many months. It now appears open, but does not have any dedicated signals. The bike lane runs to the left of traffic, but a large portion of traffic at the traffic light turns left - directly crossing the bike lane. This is incredibly dangerous for someone unfamiliar with the flow of traffic who would assume the bike lane is safe to use. Dedicated bike signals need to be installed before the bike lane is deemed safe to use.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Hawley Crescent, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights flickering on side which is tree lined, 21st May
item.description:
Street lights flickering at night
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goldfinch Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Japanese knotweed, 21st May
item.description:
Japanese knotweed was treated here before but it's growing quite tall now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-25, McNeil Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress has been dumped at the corner of the road, 21st May
item.description:
Dumped mattress from the flats

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harcourt Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Park gates, 21st May
item.description:
Can you please instruct the person who opens the park to please open both gates as when its busy with parents and others sorting themselves out it causes an obstruction for other users,and if you have a dog it can be quite worrying as the road is very busy, there have been two dog deaths that i know about. i dont know why this is happening
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned, 21st May
item.description:
Car has abandoned for 3 weeks across a drop kerb, preventing access to driveway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Pantiles, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 21st May
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Avenue, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General Rubbish on pavements, 21st May
item.description:
There us build up on rubbish on the pavement on chandler Way opposite St Lukes church. Most if the rubbish seen in the pictures was caused by the rubbish men emptying the recycling.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chandler Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on pavement on chandler way, 21st May
item.description:
There us build up on rubbish on the pavement on chandler Way opposite St Lukes church. Most if the rubbish seen in the pictures was caused by the rubbish men emptying the recycling.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chandler Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped under the railway bridge, 21st May
item.description:
X2 wheelie bins have been placed under the railway bridge at the end of Kirkwood Road. People have now started dumping rubbish here and it is building up and it is attracting animals to it. This has been an issue for about a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kirkwood Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chair dumped outside, 21st May
item.description:
Chair dumped on grass verge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 134, Lennard Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken water manhole cover, 21st May
item.description:
Please refer to the enclosed picture

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clapham Manor Street, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over, 21st May
item.description:
It seems like nobody has been cleaning this area/street for months. We have lived here since October 2025, but there is so much rubbish all the time, which stays on the green grass for months. Gardeners come to cut the grass quite often, but they go through the rubbish with the grass mowert ractor, causing even more mess. If residents aren't picking up rubbish from time to time, nobody does. We used to live in Lewisham Borough, but most of its streets were a lot cleaner than Keightley Drive in Royal Greenwich Borough.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Keightley Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on the street, 21st May
item.description:
Hi, the foxes are getting into our bins and getting rubbish all over the floor - it’s starting to rot and smell

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Mayflower Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on cabinet, 21st May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 340, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Dog poo, 21st May
item.description:
Between 59-61 Elm road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elm Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive fridge blocking the passage, 21st May
item.description:
There is a massive fridge dumped at the bottom of the stairs at Chartes House blocking the access and the passage between Abbey Street and Stevens Street. It causes a serious health and safety hazard, local kids play around and might get hurt. Could you please remove it?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stevens Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fitted kitchen dumped, 21st May
item.description:
Someone dumped a kitchen by the corner of our building yesterday afternoon. It's on the street corner by Peckham road and Walmer Castle Court

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grummant Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
